title: Kichly Non-Stick Granite 8 Pcs Cooking Pots and Pans Set Nonstick Cookware Induction Hob pan Set with 20cm, 28cm Frying Pan Set and 20cm,18cm & 16cm Saucepan Set with Lids
features: Durable Granite Cookware Set - Our 8-piece granite cookware set includes essential saucepans with lids and fry pans designed for daily cooking, offering strength, scratch resistance and durability.
Even Heat Distribution - Built with a heavy-duty aluminum base that promotes fast, even heat distribution across all the pots and pans, minimizing hot spots for better cooking.
Versatile Cooking Compatibility - Suitable for gas, electric, ceramic, and halogen stovetops, making the granite cookware set ideal for every kitchen setup.
Heat - Resistant Handles - Designed for safe and comfortable use, the handles remain cool on the stovetop, giving you a secure and confident grip while you cook.
Effortless Cooking - The BPA, PFOS & PFOA free non-stick surface requires minimal oil or butter, making it easier to prepare healthier meals for your family without sacrificing flavor.

specifications_table.Included Components: 20cm non-stick granite frying pan, 28cm non-stick granite frying pan, 20cm non-stick granite saucepan with lid, 18cm non-stick granite saucepan with lid, 16cm non-stick granite saucepan with lid
